case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. DEBORAH ANN DUGGAN

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT DUGGAN, DEBORAH ANN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUGGAN, DEBORAH ANN $15,021.20 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,271.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
